sprints.title: AgentForge v6.4.3 — Spawn Stdin Fix & Scanner Hardening

items.title: Fix spawn stdin — prevent claude subprocess from hanging on empty input
items.description: Close the stdin stream immediately after spawning the claude -p subprocess so it does not block waiting for input when no prompt is piped. Fixes autonomous cycle hanging indefinitely on execute phase. Commit: f2f70ec.

items.title: Harden TODO scanner comment-prefix matching
items.description: Tighten the proposal-to-backlog scanner's regex so it correctly matches comment-style TODO markers (// TODO, # TODO) and does not emit false positives from prose or test fixture strings. Commit: f2f70ec.

successCriteria: Autonomous execute phase no longer hangs on spawn stdin
Scanner produces zero false-positive TODOs from prose or test files
